name: admapix
tagline: ClawHub (291★): AdMapix raw data layer for ad creatives, apps, rankings, downloads/revenue, and market metadata. Returns structured JSON fr
verdict: Clean bill overall: quality A, security A, no functional or scope issues flagged. The only mark against it is bookkeeping -- no version field or changelog, so there's no way to track what changed between revisions.

highlights.summary: No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
